app.title: Weather Search
app.subtitle: Enter a city to get real-time weather information
language.label: Language
weatherForm.placeholder: City or City, Country (e.g. Madrid, Spain)
validation.minLength: City name must be at least 2 characters long.
validation.invalidCharacters: City name can only include letters, spaces, apostrophes, hyphens, and an optional country after a comma (e.g. Salamanca, Spain).
errors.cityNotFound: We could not find that city. Check the name and try again.
errors.invalidApiKey: The API key is invalid or not configured correctly.
errors.network: No connection to the service. Check your network and try again.
errors.unexpectedConnection: An unexpected error occurred while connecting to the service.
